lines: Look! I found a 'the' hiding in the kelp, {player}!
Words are everywhere if you know where to swim.
Don't let the tricky words get away, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm making a word-collection. Would you like to help me find some, {player}?
quest_progress_line: You're a very fast word-catcher, {player}! Keep it up!
quest_complete_line: Perfect! These words will look so nice in my collection. Thank you, {player}!
